ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the participant involved in the trial */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the session to which the trial belongs */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the trial for a participant */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event occurring in the trial */,
  "included_trial" INTEGER /* Indicates if the trial is included in the final analysis */,
  "reason_for_exclusion" TEXT /* Reason for exclusion if the trial is not included */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., practice, experimental, control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_reason_for_exclusion FOREIGN KEY ("reason_for_exclusion") REFERENCES exclusion_reasons ("reason_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for participant communication */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date of informed consent */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date of participant withdrawal (if applicable) */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Additional contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the trial to which the event belongs */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the stimulus presented during the event */,
  "onset" REAL /* Time at which the event occurred */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the event */,
  "executed_movement" INTEGER /* Movement executed by the participant during the event */,
  "correct_movement" INTEGER /* Correct movement expected during the event */,
  "shown_stimulus" TEXT /* Stimulus shown during the event */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken for participant response */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., stimulus presentation, response collection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the event related to the movement */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of movement executed (e.g., finger press) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the movement on a scale of 0 to 1 */,
  "movement_onset" REAL /* Start time of the movement */,
  "movement_offset" REAL /* End time of the movement */,
  "movement_accuracy_type" TEXT /* Type of accuracy measurement (e.g., speed, accuracy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movements_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "shown_stimulus" TEXT /* Stimulus presented in the trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_category" TEXT /* Category of the stimulus (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "stimulus_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the stimulus (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exclusion_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exclusion reason */,
  "reason_description" TEXT /* Description of the exclusion reason */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the exclusion reason (e.g., technical, participant-related) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the participant participating in the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes related to the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., practice, experimental) */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, assistant, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the user */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user's supervisor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
